params.name: Somersault Cloud
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Super Treasure Maps (0.03%), Wish Box, Wishing (0.06%)
* "I want your collection!" [[Altar#Relics_and_Gear|Dragon Wish]]
params.description:
On Nov 11, 327 BC, Master Bodhi taught Monkey King how to use Somersault Cloud.
Somersault Cloud is the tool that the immortals use to fly. When Monkey King used it for the first time, he could only fly a few inches instead of traveling 108,000 miles in a blink. Somersault Cloud can help Monkey King get away from the troubles, but in the eyes of others, they all envy that the Somersault Cloud gets him a stable job as a courier.
[Who travels fastest]
Monkey King: A flip to travel 108,000 …
